rationale: Ground truth is an approved, correct bugfix (2 LGTMs) whose only substantive inline comment explains why removing 'already_submitted' is safe (both submit paths reject list prompts identically). Y independently verifies this exact fact by reading stage_pool.py's ValueError guards, correctly recommends APPROVE, and directly addresses the multi-element-list edge case X worries about. X instead recommends REQUEST CHANGES and flags returning the full DiffusionOutput (preserving stage_durations) as a 'major' risk — but this is actually the correct behavior, not a bug — and pads the review with three near-duplicate 'add a test' comments instead of engaging with why the already_submitted removal is sound.
